reference: I woke up to unbearable pain that felt like it was coming from between my shoulder blades, and when it gets really intense, I experience a striking pain in my abdominal area. Both pains are currently competing for the most intense feeling.
text: Woke up to unbearable pain that felt like it was coming from between my shoulder blades, and when it gets really intense, I experience a striking pain in my gomouth area. Both pains are currently competing for the most intense feeling.
